accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; correctly notes the 1865 treaty and the three tracts.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content traces to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as transferring federal lands into trust for the Winnebago Tribe.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains that lands are declared part of the reservation and held in trust under 1865 treaty terms.

exceptions_conditions.why: Correctly notes the gaming prohibition and the valid existing rights condition.

effective_dates.why: Notes the enactment date of July 12, 2024.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all three tracts and the gaming prohibition.

correct_entities.why: Winnebago Tribe of Nebraska and Indian Gaming Regulatory Act correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 1865 treaty and July 12, 2024 date are accurate.
